debt_items.description: RefreshLogs method (lines 290-297) only performs a simulated 300ms delay without actually refreshing logs from any source. Should be implemented to actually fetch fresh logs if the API exists.

DownloadLogs uses inline JSRuntime.InvokeVoidAsync('eval', jsScript) which could be refactored to use a cleaner JavaScript wrapper function without eval injection. Though consistent with existing patterns, this is a potential security smell if log content contains malicious code.

summary: The build-detail-native-logs-widget implementation is complete and meets all acceptance criteria. The iframe section has been properly replaced with a native Blazor logs widget. All required CSS classes are defined and properly applied. The widget correctly uses _job.Logs field and the ILogParser.ParseLogMessages() method for parsing. Empty state messaging is present for null/empty log scenarios. DownloadLogs method correctly uses JSRuntime.InvokeVoidAsync for JavaScript execution. The implementation matches existing Build Log container styling with proper scrollable container and max-height. While tests exist for ILogParser with good coverage, they could not be executed directly due to .NET SDK version mismatch in the environment.
